name: Electricity Consumption
description: Total electricity consumption, in billion units (BU), is one of the fastest-available reads on real economic activity — industrial output, commercial activity and household demand all show up here almost immediately, well before official production data.
releaseSchedule: Released monthly, within the first week of the following month.

chart.title: Summer demand pushed consumption to a seasonal peak
chart.subtitle: Electricity consumption, billion units (BU), monthly
